purpose: Cross-pair regime screen: does the proven USDJPY Bull+VIX>15 gate (HYP-027) generalize? For each pair, measure Sharpe in vs out of the Bull+VIX regime. Find pairs that THRIVE in the regime that kills USDJPY -> cross-pair router candidate. RESEARCH ONLY: produces a table, no gating decision, no live change.
regime_definition: Bull AND elevated VIX: SPY > 200-day SMA AND VIX > vix_threshold (the same lens HYP-027 proves for USDJPY).
vix_threshold_rationale: SINGLE frozen value = the pre-proven HYP-027/v013 threshold. Deliberately NOT a swept grid — sweeping thresholds is the multiple-comparisons surface that produced the HYP-044 in-sample artifact (15->13 gave +0.242 IS, 0.000 OOS). One principled threshold, no post-hoc tuning.
both_sides_rule: For EVERY pair report Sharpe in BOTH regime states: in_regime (Bull+VIX>15 trades only) AND out_regime (gated = everything else). Never condition on outcome.
no_mid_run_tuning: Frozen. regime_screen.py asserts vix_threshold + pairs + splits match this file (tripwire) and refuses to run a tuned spec.
verdict_discipline: The screen outputs a TABLE only. A cross-pair gate becomes a hypothesis ONLY via scripts/run_hypothesis.py (permutation>=1000 + IS/OOS + BH + decay>=0.50). Nothing is labelled v016 pre-gauntlet. Existing EURUSD=18/GBPUSD=18/AUDUSD=20 gates are re-examined here for OOS-reality.
isolation: Reads/runs the forex backtester in-memory with patched PAIR_VIX_GATES; touches NO live config. position_sizer and the sizing/leverage formula are untouched.
